name: Prawns Steamed with Mustard Seeds
recipeIngredient: 1 fresh hot green chili, finely chopped
1 lb medium-sized uncooked prawns, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the mustard seeds coarsely.
2. Place the ground mustard seeds in a medium sized, non-reactive bowl.
3. Add 1 tablespoon of water and mix.
4. Add onion, green chili, turmeric, salt, chili powder, and mustard oil; mix well.
5. Cover with foil and set aside while you prepare the steaming equipment.
6. Steam the prawns in a covered container over boiling water for about 10 minutes,
or until they turn opaque throughout.
7. Stir the prawns once more after approximately 6 minutes of steaming, ensuring to cover
the bowl and steaming utensil afterward.
